title: Moroccan Keto Beef Tagine
description: A flavorful and spicy beef tagine recipe, keto-friendly and perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Moroccan beef flank steak
ingredients.notes: Look for flank steak with a good balance of fat and lean meat.

ingredients.name: Charred red onion
ingredients.notes: Charring the onion adds a depth of flavor to the tagine.

ingredients.name: Pillowy couscous
ingredients.notes: Traditional tagine is served with couscous, but feel free to substitute with cauliflower rice for a lower-carb option.

ingredients.name: Tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: This blend typically includes cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and ginger.

ingredients.name: Coconut oil
ingredients.notes: Use coconut oil for a keto-friendly option.

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Garnish with chopped parsley for a fresh touch.

instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together the tagine spice blend and salt.
3. Rub the spice blend mixture all over the beef flank steak, making sure to coat it evenly.
4. Heat the coconut oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
5. Sear the beef flank steak for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
6. Add the charred red onion to the pot and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
7. Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
8. Remove the pot from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
9. Slice the beef against the grain and serve with the charred red onion and pillowy couscous.
10. Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
